currentState.summary: Pre-sprint research complete. 166 guardrail patterns (+48 Hindi/Tagalog), 5 casino KB JSONs, TTLCache migration, ops runbook. Ready for 20-round per-dimension hostile sprint.

nextSteps.description: LAUNCH 20-round per-dimension hostile sprint: per-dim teams with fix-review-judge loops (R35+)
Weakest dimensions to target first: Scalability(5.0), Guardrails(5.5→improved with Hindi/Tagalog), Domain(6.5→improved with 4 casino KBs)
Use TeamCreate swarm per REVIEW ROUND PROTOCOL in CLAUDE.md. 2 reviewers + 1 fixer per round.
Sprint cost: ~$850-1250 for 20 rounds. Rate limit: stagger 5 dimensions at a time, not all 10.

scores.note: R33-R34 use 4-model hostile cross-validation. Pre-sprint additions should lift Guardrails and Domain scores.
